    T

    tearDown() - Method in class io.FileHandlerTest
     
    testConsumeResourcesDamagingTheStructure() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if consuming resources damages a structure when the player does not have enough resources.
    testConsumeResourcesDegradesStructure() - Method in class models.Structures.StructuresBaseTest
    Tests if a structure loses one level when the owner does not have enough resources to pay maintenance.
    testConsumeResourcesDestroyingTheStructure() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if consuming resources destroys a structure when its level reaches zero.
    testConsumeResourcesDestroysStructure() - Method in class models.Structures.StructuresBaseTest
    Tests if a structure is destroyed when it cannot pay maintenance while already at level 1.
    testConsumeResourcesWithoutDamagingTheStructure() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if consuming resources does not damage a structure when the player has enough resources.
    testConsumeResourcesWithSuccess() - Method in class models.Structures.StructuresBaseTest
    Tests if a structure successfully pays its maintenance cost.
    testCorrectAPNeededQuantity() - Method in class models.Structures.CreateStructureTest
    Tests if the correct Action Point cost is returned for each structure type.
    testCorrectExpenseValue() - Method in class models.Structures.CreateStructureTest
    Tests if the material cost returned for each structure type is correct.
    testCorrectMaterialType() - Method in class models.Structures.CreateStructureTest
    Tests if the correct material type is returned for each structure type.
    testCreateStructureThrowsCoordinatesOutOfBoundException() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameEngineTest
    Tests if creating a structure outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
    testCreateStructureThrowsInsufficientAPException() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameEngineTest
    Tests if creating a structure without enough Action Points throws InsufficientAPException.
    testCreateStructureThrowsInsufficientResourcesException() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameEngineTest
    Tests if creating a structure without enough resources throws InsufficientResourcesException.
    testCreateStructureThrowsSpaceAlreadyOccupiedException() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameEngineTest
    Tests if creating a structure in an occupied position throws SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException.

    Tests if a City is created with the correct initial values.

    Tests the end of Player 1's turn.
    testEndTurnFromPlayerTwoTriggersNewDay() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameSessionTest
    Tests the end of Player 2's turn.

    Tests the event where both resource production and score are doubled.
    testEventDoubleProduction() - Method in class jogo.engine.EventsTest
    Tests the event where structures produce double resources.
    testEventDoubleScore() - Method in class jogo.engine.EventsTest
    Tests the event where structures give double score.

    Tests the general strike event.
    testEventZeroProduction() - Method in class jogo.engine.EventsTest
    Tests the event where structures do not produce resources.
    testEventZeroScore() - Method in class jogo.engine.EventsTest
    Tests the event where structures do not give score.
    testGameOverAndWinnerDetermination() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameSessionTest
    Tests if the game ends after the maximum number of days and if the winner is determined correctly.

    Tests if the Ranch generates food correctly.

    Tests if structures generate resources correctly.

    Tests if getStructureInfo returns the correct structure.
